zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Adam Lord of Roch Castle De LaRoche於1160年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾時，他的父親Rodbert FitzGodebert34歲，母親Sibilla de Valoines22歲。他於1185年與Blandiane Marshal de Pembroke在威爾士結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1220年在威爾士布洛可爾享年60歲，埋葬在威爾士布洛可爾米爾福德 哈文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Adam Lord of Roch Castle De LaRoche于1160年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾时，他的父亲Rodbert FitzGodebert34岁，母亲Sibilla de Valoines22岁。他于1185年与Blandiane Marshal de Pembroke在威尔士结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1220年在威尔士布洛可爾享年60岁，埋葬在威尔士布洛可爾米爾福德 哈文。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: LaRoche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Fernand, Normand, Pierre, Jacques, Laurent, Adrien, Cecile, Germain, Marcel.
French:
habitational name from any of numerous places in various parts of France named Laroche or La Roche, from Old French roche ‘rock’, with feminine definite article la.

variants.name: Roche
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Declan, Eamonn, Fergus, Fionnuala, Kevin Patrick, Liam.
Irish (Munster) and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Roach  . Compare   Roch  .

French: topographic name for someone who lived by a rocky outcrop or crag, from Old French roche ‘rock’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the variant Laroche 2. Compare Deroche .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical. See Adam .

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Roch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Italian Rocco; .

nameMeanings.name: Castle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name from Anglo-Norman French, Middle English castel ‘castle, fortified building or set of buildings’, especially the residence of a feudal lord (from Late Latin castellum, a diminutive of castrum ‘fort, Roman walled city’). The name would also have denoted a servant who lived and worked at such a place, or someone who had an obligation to provide services or rent to a castle.

variants.name: Castell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Roberto, Amarilys, Carlos, Eduardo, Estevan, Francisco, Guadalupe, Humberto, Jorge, Manuel, Mateo, Pablo.
English and Scottish: variant of   Castle  .

Manx: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Asgaill ‘son of Ásketill’, an Old Norse personal name composed of the elements áss ‘god’ + ketill ‘sacrificial cauldron, helmet’. The Manx surname is cognate with Scottish Gaelic McAskill .

variants.name: Cassell
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name of Norman origin, from Cassel in the Nord department, Flanders, France.
English: sometimes a variant of   Castle  .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Caisile, which is probably in origin a variant of Ó Caiside, see Cassidy .

variants.name: Castel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Benoit, Herve, Jean Michel, Thierry, Yves.  Spanish Jose, Blanco, Carlos, Rafael.
English: variant of   Castle  .
Aragonese, Catalan, and Jewish (Sephardic): variant of   Castell   3, a cognate of 5 below.

variants.name: Castles
meanings: English: variant of Castle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Armagh and Meath): in Ireland, this may be the English name, but it may also be an Anglicized form of Ó Caisil; see Cashell .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Adam Lord of Roch Castle De LaRoche was born in 1160, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Rodbert FitzGodebert, was 34 and his mother, Sibilla de Valoines, was 22. He married Blandiane Marshal de Pembroke in 1185, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1220, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 60, and was buried in Milford Haven, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Adam Lord of Roch Castle De LaRoche est né en 1160, à Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rodbert FitzGodebert, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Sibilla de Valoines, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Blandiane Marshal de Pembroke en 1185, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1220, à Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Milford Haven, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

de.Appleton Priory, Yorkshire, England: East and West Appleton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Adam Lord of Roch Castle De LaRoche 1160 in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rodbert FitzGodebert 34 und seine Mutter Sibilla de Valoines 22. Er hat 1185 in Wales Blandiane Marshal de Pembroke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1220 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Pembrokeshire, Wales und wurde in Milford Haven, Pembrokeshire, Wales begraben.

Lui sposato Blandiane Marshal de Pembroke nel 1185, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1220, nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Milford Haven, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adam Lord of Roch Castle De LaRocheが1160年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで生まれた時，父Rodbert FitzGodebertは34歳，母Sibilla de Valoinesは22歳であった。1185年にウェールズでBlandiane Marshal de Pembrokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1220年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで60歳で死去し，ウェールズペンブロケシュアイアミルフォード ヘイベンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam Lord of Roch Castle De LaRoche(이)가 1160년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rodbert FitzGodebert(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibilla de Valoines(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1185년 웨일스에서 Blandiane Marshal de Pembroke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1220년 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 p브로케실르 미퍼드 하븐에 묻혔다.

ru.Appleton Priory, Yorkshire, England: эаст анд вест эпплетон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Adam Lord of Roch Castle De LaRoche родился в 1160 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Rodbert FitzGodebert было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Sibilla de Valoines, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Blandiane Marshal de Pembroke в 1185 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1220 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности милфорд хавен, пемброкешир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Adam Lord of Roch Castle De LaRoche nació en 1160, en Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Rodbert FitzGodebert, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Sibilla de Valoines, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Blandiane Marshal de Pembroke en 1185, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1220, en Pembrokeshire, Gales, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Milford Haven, Pembrokeshire, Gales.
